name: Inaros Prime
description: Rise, eternal, to cast the fear of Inaros into them. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: When Inaros takes lethal damage, he entombs himself in a sarcophagus and incarnates as sand to attack enemies, draining their lifeforce to revive himself.

abilities.name: Desiccation
abilities.description: Blast enemies with a wave of cursed sand that blinds them and steals their health.

abilities.name: Sandstorm
abilities.description: Become a sandstorm. Inaros devours enemies pulled into his whirlwind, healing himself.

abilities.name: Scarab Shell
abilities.description: Activate to form Armor by draining Inaros' Health. Activate again to stop the formation early. The protective layer reduces incoming Damage and absorbs Status Effects.

abilities.name: Scarab Swarm
abilities.description: Summon a Scarab Swarm to attack enemies with guaranteed <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Status. Damage scales with Inaros' Health. Enemies killed while immersed in the swarm summon a Swarm Kavat that fights alongside Inaros and guides the scarabs to other enemies.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Rise, eternal, to cast the fear of Inaros into them. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Inaros Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Inaros Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Inaros Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #2
patchlogs.changes: Excluded Reactant and Index Point pickups from Simulor, Inaros' Sandstorm, Zephyr Tornado, and Vauban's Vortex. This also fixes the exception lists for the Simulor; it wasn't supposed to be moving  gameplay objects (eg Datamass, Excavation Power Cells, Raptor Cells, etc) but it generally wasn't of a problem because the objects were heavy enough (properly excluding them should run faster too!). As more and more gameplay components rely on pickups, we've addressed this issue as it is commonly discussed by you all.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Inaros not being teleported to the correct position when you open up the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed various clipping issues with Inaros.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 12
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sands of Inaros quest countdown timer displaying the incorrect location.

patchlogs.fixes:

Fixed an issue with Inaros’ Devouring allies affected by Radiation Damage and permanently locking Inaros in the animation for the duration of the mission.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Enemies that are being Devoured by Inaros can no longer be hurt/killed by another player, only the user Devouring the enemy can cause damage to it at that time.
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed incorrect text in The Inaros Bundle description.
•    Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Swarm healing objectives. (Defense Pods, etc.)

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Sands of Inaros bundle diorama appearing blurry.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: ·         The Hieroglyphics that Baro mentions in the Sands of Inaros quest have been added. I guess they do exist!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Fixed Inaros’ Sandstorm staying active after death until the player respawns in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Clients not seeing the laser eye FX on enemies in the final stage of the Sands of Inaros quest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed Sentinel kills not counting toward the Sacred Vessel progress in the Sands of Inaros quest.
•    Fixed Inaros appearing transparent after reviving.
•    Fixed Inaros’ diorama missing his cloth attachments.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.changes:
•    Fixed Inaros’ Sandstorm lingering even after death in Conclave.
•    Improved the FX on Inaros’ abilities.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Sands of Inaros’ Sacred Vessel diorama becoming stuck on screen, preventing progress in the Quest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Players can now review the Sacred Vessel more closely in their Landing Craft when playing the Sands of Inaros Quest.
Fixed Inaros’ Sandstorm visual FX covering too large an area when ranged Mods are equipped.
Fixed an issue that prevented players from completing the Second Dream’s shield-draining puzzle with Inaros.
Fixed an error causing Inaros to get stuck when devouring friendly targets affected by the Radiation proc.
Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Swarm being usable on corpses.
Fixed an issue in the Sands of Inaros Quest that could cause menus to freeze after seeing the in-Mission Sacred Vessel diorama.  
Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Swarm not having consistent targeting when moving the camera while aiming.
Fixed several overlapping textures and holes in Inaros’ tomb in the Sands of Inaros Quest Mission.
Fixed Inaros’s Sandstorm visual FX lingering after death in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Trinity’s Energy Vampire will no longer affect Inaros when in Sandstorm.
Fixed weapons with alt fire being usable during Inaros’ Sandstorm.
Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Swarm not healing Sentinels.
Fixed Inaros’ Devour not being able to consume enemies below his position.
Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Armor buff persisting through death.
Fixed Inaros starting at 0 shields when using an Archwing.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Inaros’ Dessicate and Banshee’s Sonic Boom range has been increased and now hit in a 40 degree FOV.
Baro Ki’Teer will now have a unique greeting when interacting with Inaros.
Fixed some visual fx causing the torches in the Sands of Inaros Quest to appear pixelated.
Fixed not receiving an Inbox message after completing the Sands of Inaros Quest.
Fixed an issue allowing players to cast other abilities during Inaros’ Devour after entering the pause menu during Devour’s cast.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to view the Sands of Inaros Quest diorama in your Codex after completing the Quest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.4
patchlogs.changes: •    The Provoked Mod now affects Inaros's bleed out damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Sands of Inaros Changes and Fixes
Lowered damage of the Inaros Golem’s laser eyes.
Improved the targeting of the Inaros Golem.
Slightly adjusted the quality of all VO within the Sands of Inaros Quest.
Made various audio adjustments to the Sands of Inaros’ Quest levels.
Fixed an issue causing unique golem enemies in the Sands of Inaros Quest to get stuck.
Fixed an issue that would enable players to kill the final boss of the Quest when playing as Inaros in a pre-death state.
Adjusted Inaros’ sarcophagus audio FX.
Improved the quality of Inaros’ sarcophagus’ animations.
Fixed players being unable to trade Inaros’ Blueprint.
Fixed Inaros’ Idle Animation Icons not displaying properly.
Fixed Inaros’ Scarab Swarm not taking on the proper energy color for audio FX.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
New Warframe: Inaros
Inaros 
 Risen from the sands, Inaros commands the desert's fearsome power.
DEVOUR  marks your target, trapping it in quicksand. Charging the ability will draw them towards Inaros for devouring.  Alternatively, Inaros or his allies can activate the target, transferring a percentage of its health and shields. If the target dies by the hands of Inaros, a sand shadow will spawn to assist him.
SANDSTORM transforms Inaros into a whirling spiral of sand, gathering nearby pickups and throwing enemies away. Enemies previously marked for devour within its radius will drained of shields and health.
New Quest: Sands of Inaros
A uniquely-styled alternate helmet for Inaros.
With Inaros, the sands of old have been swept away from U18 Warframe leaving behind a newer, more vibrant U18.5 Warframe. In many respects, 18.5 is a remastered, more HD version of Warframe with months of technical graphical improvements and artistic relighting of many parts of the game (and more to come in subsequent updates). On top of these changes are across the board rendering performance improvements we hope you'll enjoy, keep in mind that your particular hardware may benefit more and benefit less depending on your GPU, resolution and preferred graphics settings.
